query_normalized: from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persistent autonomous ai computer science
rationale: This paper addresses the core conceptual shift from isolated AI tools to collaborative partners (Rule b/f), which directly maps to the user's "Chatbot to Digital Colleague" paradigm shift within the AI agent domain. It provides a canonical framework for defining the "Digital Colleague" construct (as a collaborative decision mediator) even though applied to a specific healthcare vertical.
